purpose: Machine-checkable quality rubric for a prompt or prompt-system deliverable.

dimensions.pass_rule: Deliverable defines output shape, format, and length bounds plus a minimal example.
dimensions.fail_marker: Output described in prose only; no schema or example.

dimensions.pass_rule: Prompt runs in a single pass when all required inputs are present.
dimensions.fail_marker: Prompt needs undefined clarification to execute.

dimensions.pass_rule: Anti-drift and safety constraints appear inside the prompt text, not only in docs.
dimensions.fail_marker: Constraints exist only in surrounding documentation.

dimensions.pass_rule: Specifies placeholder, ask-once, or stop behavior for missing inputs.
Evals cover happy path, minimal input, conflicting requirements, false positive, unsafe injection.
Refuses credential capture, hidden chain-of-thought, unsafe automation; blocks instead of partial comply.
dimensions.fail_marker: Partial compliance with an unsafe request.

dimensions.pass_rule: Every load-bearing claim carries an Alfa-core evidence tag.

scoring.note: A safety_boundary fail is an immediate block regardless of total weight; green total is never reported as success without it.
